## Test plan

- [ ] `mvn -B verify` passes
- [ ] New/changed behaviour is covered by a test
- [ ] New or changed **BREAKING / COMPAT / WARN** behaviour has a row in the
      taxonomy table test (`ContractVerifierTest`) — that suite *is* the spec
